meaning: vt.分担,共享vi.共享,参与,带有
examples: Would you care to partake of some refreshment?
They preferred not to partake in the social life of the town.
They were happy to partake of our feast, but not to share our company.
And Bangkok has more than its fair share of places to partake in this literary tradition.
Opting for the phrase, "The Roadside Attraction, " Jason said the decision to partake was a no-brainer.
